import threading
import time

def start_background_cleanup():
    def cleanup_loop():
        while True:
            remove_stale_sessions()
            time.sleep(300)

    t = threading.Thread(target=cleanup_loop, daemon=True)
    t.start()

def remove_stale_sessions():
    pass

def start_metrics_collector():
    def collect():
        while True:
            gather_metrics()
            time.sleep(60)

    worker = threading.Thread(target=collect, daemon=True)
    worker.start()

def gather_metrics():
    pass

def start_wal_checkpoint():
    def checkpoint():
        while True:
            run_checkpoint()
            time.sleep(3600)

    t = threading.Thread(target=checkpoint, daemon=True)
    t.start()

def run_checkpoint():
    pass
